summary: Iteration 23: Complete E2E testing of BB Modules (BluBridge extension). All 45 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend navigation and CRUD flows work correctly. New modules: Home page (6-button nav hub), Create Job Roles, Hiring Forms (with conditions), Interview Schedule Reports (with filters/summary/export), Update Applicants Scores (with rounds), Create Job Openings. All existing endpoints remain functional.

backend: GET /api/bb/form-types - returns list of form types
GET /api/bb/interview-reports - returns data with summary (role_counts, attended, not_attended, premium, non_premium)
GET /api/bb/interview-reports with filters - filters work correctly
GET /api/bb/attended-for-scores with date filter - date filter works
All BB endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
frontend: /home shows 6 module buttons with correct data-testid attributes
Navigation from Home to each module works
/hiring-forms - Form Types section with Add/Edit/Delete works
/hiring-forms - Forms section with conditions modal works
/interview-reports - Date filters, job role filter, attendance filter, college filter present
/interview-reports - Table shows data with summary counts
/update-scores - Date filter and Apply button work
/update-scores - Rounds button opens modal for CRUD
Back button navigation works on all new pages

critical_code_review_comments: BB modules are cleanly separated in /app/backend/bb_modules.py with init_bb() injection pattern
All new collections use bb_ prefix (bb_job_roles, bb_form_types, bb_hiring_forms, bb_rounds, bb_job_openings, bb_applicant_updates)
Interview reports endpoint reads from existing registered_candidates collection and uses existing _classify_college function
All new frontend pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Home page replaces default landing - login redirects to /home, /dashboard accessible from there
Existing endpoints under /api/* are UNTOUCHED and still functional
seed_data_creation: Test data created via API with TEST_ prefix: TEST_Frontend_Engineer (job role), TEST_Application (form type), TEST_Technical_Interview (round). All test data cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BB Modules fully tested and working. Key features: (1) All new CRUD endpoints under /api/bb/* prefix, (2) Home page at /home with 6 navigation buttons (data-testid: nav-dashboard, nav-hiring-forms, nav-interview-reports, nav-update-scores, nav-manage-job-roles, nav-job-openings), (3) Interview reports shows summary with role_counts, attended, not_attended, premium_colleges, non_premium_colleges, (4) Hiring forms support conditions (age_min/max, grad_year_min/max, locations, location_change, attend_in_person, college_limit), (5) Update scores page shows attended applicants with status and round scores, (6) All existing endpoints still work. DB has 9 registered_candidates records from previous sessions.
